title: Fix a multi-anti-pattern LiveView (pick 2)
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/notifications_list_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NotificationsListLive). It must fix TWO anti-patterns: (1) DB query in mount — move to handle_params; (2) unscoped PubSub topic — use "notifications:user:#{user_id}" instead of "notifications". mount/3 takes %{"user_id" => user_id}, subscribes via connected? guard. Everything else is normal.
tier_rationale: Fix 2 distinct anti-patterns in one module. Not independent — must be applied together.
